name: Rotem Shani Entrepreneurship and Investment Ltd.
summary: Rotem Shani Entrepreneurship and Investment Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Israel. It is involved in the residential and/or commercial construction projects. The company was formerly known as Delta Eshbol Entrepreneurship Ltd. and changed its name to Rotem Shani Entrepreneurship and Investment Ltd. in May 1996. Rotem Shani Entrepreneurship and Investment Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
